title: Prioritized Roadmap to Golden State
subtitle: Driven by current capabilities matrix state and associated risks. Target: 12 months.

goldenState.title: Golden state
goldenState.description: A controllership operating model where data flows from systems of record to the general ledger and consolidation with minimal manual intervention, governed by clear ownership and competency at the right levels.
outcomes: Reinsurance: Settlement and treaty accounting automated where possible; L3/L4 depth for policy and audit defense; collateral/LOC process standardized.
Investment: Clearwater–Oracle feed owned and automated; L3/L4 coverage for structured securities, derivatives, and complex valuations.
Close: FAST–Oracle and TMS integrated; LDTI and segment reporting with audit-ready traceability.
Data completeness and governance embedded in all processes and system flows.

phases.label: Stabilization
phases.focus: Reduce immediate restatement and key-person risk.

initiatives.title: JPY/F/X and treaty settlement logic fix
initiatives.description: Stabilize reinsurance settlement execution (currently L3 manual). Fix translation and treaty logic; document and control to reduce restatement risk.

initiatives.title: Intercompany and reinsurance reconciliation baseline
initiatives.description: Clean up intercompany and ceded/assumed reconciliation; create audit-ready baseline for treaty accounting.

initiatives.title: Reinsurance technical accounting (DIG B-36) documentation
initiatives.description: Document embedded derivative and DIG B-36 approach; reduce reliance on single point of knowledge (currently L1 manual).

initiatives.title: Collateral and LOC process and calendar
initiatives.description: Formalize collateral/LOC monitoring and renewal process to avoid BMA/NAIC compliance gaps.

phases.label: Integration
phases.focus: Automate high-volume manual work and establish data ownership.

initiatives.title: FAST-to-Oracle feed automation
initiatives.description: Automate policy/claims data flow from FAST to Oracle Fusion GL to reduce manual subledger-to-GL work.

initiatives.title: Treasury Management System (TMS) full implementation
initiatives.description: Complete TMS rollout and eliminate manual cash booking and subledger gaps.

initiatives.title: Clearwater–Oracle feed: dedicated data owner and mapping governance
initiatives.description: Assign data owner for Investment data flow; document and govern Clearwater-to-GL mapping to reduce restatement risk as asset classes grow.

initiatives.title: Treaty accounting automation (L2–L3 scope)
initiatives.description: Automate routine treaty accounting entries and settlement posting where feasible to reduce manual L2–L3 load.

phases.label: Automation and depth
phases.focus: Expand automation and build L3/L4 competency where manual remains.

initiatives.title: Settlement workflow automation in Oracle
initiatives.description: Design and implement automated settlement workflows (target L4 capability) for ceded/assumed and retroceded flows.

initiatives.title: Clearwater–Oracle API and auto-mapping
initiatives.description: Implement automated mapping for new asset classes; reduce manual feed breaks and mapping errors.

initiatives.title: LDTI reporting and actuarial–finance bridge
initiatives.description: Automate or standardize LDTI reporting and actuarial-to-finance bridge to remove manual restatement risk.

initiatives.title: Structured securities and derivatives: L3/L4 coverage plan
initiatives.description: Define target L3/L4 depth for OTTI, hedge accounting, and complex valuations; hire or develop and document.

phases.label: Optimization and governance
phases.focus: Touchless close, full audit traceability, and sustained governance.

initiatives.title: OneStream-to-Workiva pipeline
initiatives.description: Automate consolidation and reporting flow to Workiva for filing and audit readiness.

initiatives.title: Segment and adjusted operating income automation
initiatives.description: Automate segment analysis and AOI views for board-ready T+3 visibility.

initiatives.title: Reinsurance policy and SSAP/ASC interpretation (L4)
initiatives.description: Establish or designate L4 ownership for treaty language interpretation and policy; close audit defense gap.

initiatives.title: Data completeness and governance framework
initiatives.description: Embed data ownership, completeness checks, and governance controls across all critical flows (FAST, Clearwater, TMS, OneStream).
